# elizaos-plugins/plugin-openrouter Daily Update (Apr 7, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for April 7, 2026, focused on addressing environment-specific compatibility issues to improve the developer experience for Windows users.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Environment Compatibility**
* Addressed a blocking issue for Windows users by removing PGlite `:memory:` artifacts that were interfering with git checkouts. [#25](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-openrouter/pull/25)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* [#25](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-openrouter/pull/25): fix: remove PGlite :memory: artifacts blocking Windows git checkout. This PR is currently open and awaiting review.

## CLOSED ISSUES
* None.

## NEW ISSUES
* None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
* None.
